evals.name: atomic-transaction
evals.prompt: Create a service that decrements user balance and creates an order record in a single operation.
evals.expected_output: Use of database transactions with error handling and rollback logic.

evals.name: jittered-resilience
evals.prompt: Write a function to fetch data from an external unstable API with retries.
evals.expected_output: Implementation of exponential backoff with random jitter.

evals.name: zod-border-safety
evals.prompt: Create a NestJS controller action that receives a 'CreateUserDto'.
evals.expected_output: Runtime validation using Zod (or Class-Validator) at the request boundary.
